sections.title: Would Like To — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Would Like To — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Would Like To is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + would like to + base verb (polite way of expressing a wish). Rules: 'Would like to' is a polite, formal way of saying 'want to' | Same form for all subjects: would like to | Negative: would not like to / wouldn't like to | Question: Would + subject + like to...?
sections.formula: Subject + would like to + base verb (polite way of expressing a wish)

examples.english: I would like to know this.
I would like to meet you.
She would like to ask something.
We would like to have a coffee.
They would like to travel.
Would you like to eat something?

sections.title: Would Like To — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Would Like To — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Here are everyday sentences using Would Like To that you will use in daily conversation, at home, and with friends.
sections.formula: Subject + would like to + base verb (polite way of expressing a wish)

examples.hindi: मैं इस बारे में और जानना चाहूँगा।
examples.english: I would like to know more about this.
He would like to give his opinion.
We would like to take this opportunity.
Would you like to sit down?
I would like to say thank you.

examples.hindi: वह अपना विचार साझा करना चाहेगी।
examples.english: She would like to share her idea.

sections.title: Would Like To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Would Like To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Would Like To in professional and office contexts so you can use it confidently at work.
sections.formula: Subject + would like to + base verb (polite way of expressing a wish)

examples.hindi: हम इस project पर काम करना चाहेंगे।
examples.english: We would like to work on this project.
Would you like to drink something?
I would like to apologize.

examples.hindi: वे इस topic पर चर्चा करना चाहेंगे।
examples.english: They would like to discuss this topic.
I would like to ask this question.
He would like to take a break.

sections.title: Would Like To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Would Like To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: Learn how to make negative sentences and questions using Would Like To. Common mistakes: forgetting to keep the base verb form, or wrong subject agreement.
sections.formula: Subject + would like to + base verb (polite way of expressing a wish)

examples.english: We would like to help you.
Would you like to say something?
I would like to learn this.
She would like to give a presentation.

examples.hindi: हम इसे जल्दी खत्म करना चाहेंगे।
examples.english: We would like to finish this soon.
I would like to give a suggestion.
